title: mazus novaezeelandiae subsp. novaezeelandiae
intro: Mazus novaezeelandiae subsp. novaezeelandiae, also known as New Zealand Mazus, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Mazus novaezeelandiae subsp. novaezeelandiae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
